generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are actively targeting our civil defense systems? Recent reports show that hackers from hostile nations are probing our emergency alert systems, putting our communities at risk. We can't afford to be complacent. It's time to strengthen our civil defense preparedness and ensure we're ready for any threat. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
